EXERCISE / FOUNDATION / MARKET RESEARCH
This exercise h elps you answer th e question:
WHAT ’ S MY TARGET MARKET ?
Understanding your market is essential to creating a high-converting webinar
funnel. Doing this will help you to get a clear sense of who the people are in
your market, the main issues are that they are dealing with, what solutions
are currently being offered, and where those solutions fall short.
STEP 1. GOOGLE YOUR MARKET
✓ 	Go to Google and enter “[your market] biggest problems”. Make a list of
the problems that come up in the search:

EXERCISE / FOUNDATION / MARKET RESEARCH
STEP 2. RESEARCH COMPETITIVE OFFERINGS

solutions to the problems you’re solving in you webinar/product?

and the problems they claims to solve)?
